calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-27-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Norman MacLeod.

Ms. Rasch stated that the difference between the proposed distribution only affects for of the Beneficiaries who are getting the residue, that the total difference came to $346.76, that she is asking that the amount be taken off of her total fees, that this is easier than going back to the Beneficiaries and that she is asking that it be an offset against her statutory fees. Ms. Rasch also presented a revised order and stated that she will leave her calculations with Ms. Trowbridge (Probate Examiner). The Court granted the Amended Petition for Final Distribution, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Continued To Dec-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Probate Examiner informed the Court that Counsel sent an e-mail requesting a continuance during the time that she was out of the office. The Amended Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to December 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.
